---
title: "Hannah Rozenbaum"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: assets/headshot.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:hannahrozen@ucla.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hannah-rozenbaum-764526335/  
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Download Resume
      href: assets/resume.pdf                                  
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Welcome to my website!

I am a rising junior at UCLA studying Statistics & Data Science.

### About Me

Hi! I'm Hannah! A little about me:

- Background: I'm from the suburbs of Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. 
- Passions & Career Interests: I am also deeply passionate about teaching and mentorship! I tutor a high school student in math and chemistry and will teach coding this summer. I am interested in the intersection of data science and education.
- Hobbies: I love outdoor activities like hiking, skiing, paddleboarding, and kayaking.

<style>
.about-image {
  object-fit: cover;
  /* Shift the photo content down/up inside the circle */
  object-position: 45% 45%; 
}

/* 2. Target the container (the circular border) to define the boundary */
.jolla .about-image-container {
  overflow: hidden; /* CRUCIAL: Keeps the zoomed image trapped in the circle! */
  box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); /* Optional: Adds a soft shadow for depth */
}

/* 3. Apply the inner zoom only within the container context */
.jolla .about-image-container img {
  /* Increase the size to zoom the face in the frame.
     Change 1.6 to 1.7 or 1.8 for tighter zoom, 1.4 for wider zoom. */
  transform: scale(5.8); 
  transform-origin: center top; /* Keeps the top of your head from being cut off */
}
</style>
